entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A region in Asia whose agrifood systems are highly vulnerable to climate variability.

entities.name: AGRIFOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems involved in the production, processing, and distribution of food and fiber.

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Fluctuations in climate patterns that threaten farming and livelihoods.

entities.name: DROUGHTS
entities.description: Prolonged periods of abnormally low rainfall threatening rainfed farming.

entities.name: FLOODS
entities.description: Overflows of water that submerge land, threatening agrifood systems.

entities.name: HEATWAVES
entities.description: Prolonged periods of excessively hot weather threatening agrifood systems.

entities.name: RAINFED FARMING
entities.description: Agriculture that relies solely on rainfall for water.

entities.name: RURAL LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing basic necessities for people living in rural areas.

entities.name: DISTRICT-LEVEL ADVISORIES
entities.description: Traditional agricultural guidance provided at a broad administrative level lacking precision.

entities.name: RISK MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of identifying and controlling threats at the farm scale.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Center for Semi-Arid Tropics, the organization that developed AI-powered platforms.

entities.name: INTELLIGENT SYSTEMS ADVISORY TOOL (ISAT)
entities.description: An AI-powered platform that generates automated, context-specific agromet advisories.

entities.name: NEXT-GEN CLIMATE SERVICES DASHBOARD (NGCS)
entities.description: An AI-powered platform for climate services and advisory generation.

entities.name: HISTORICAL CLIMATE DATA
entities.description: Past records of weather and climate patterns used for AI integration.

entities.name: REAL-TIME FORECASTS
entities.description: Current and future weather predictions used for AI integration.

entities.name: LOCAL AGRONOMIC INFORMATION
entities.description: Site-specific data regarding soil and crops used for AI integration.

entities.name: MACHINE LEARNING
entities.description: A subset of AI used to translate weather data into actionable insights.

entities.name: DECISION-TREE LOGIC
entities.description: A logic structure used by AI platforms to generate recommendations.

entities.name: SOWING
entities.description: The process of planting seeds, for which AI provides timely recommendations.

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The artificial application of water, for which AI provides timely recommendations.

entities.name: CROP PROTECTION
entities.description: The practice of managing pests and diseases, for which AI provides timely recommendations.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production, which showed significant improvement through AI advisories.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where field pilots of AI-powered platforms were conducted.

entities.name: MONSOON MISSION-III
entities.description: An Indian initiative under which AI platforms are being scaled.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where AI-driven advisory systems are being adapted.

entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: A global partnership facilitating the adaptation of tools through its Climate Action and Digital Transformation Accelerator.

entities.name: CLIMATE ACTION AND DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION ACCELERATOR
entities.description: A CGIAR initiative for adapting AI tools for Africa.

entities.name: CLIMATE-RESILIENT AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practices designed to withstand and recover from climate shocks.
